MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 34 

ICD_TITLE 

LABEL: ICD-10 Cause of Death Title 

DESCRIPTION: This field is the narrative description of the ICD-10 cause of death code value (for variable ICD_CODE). 

SHORT NAME: ICD_TITLE 

LONG NAME: ICD_TITLE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 120 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: —
